information.\"\"\"\n26\t    tag: str\n27\t    published_at: str\n28\t    is_correctness: bool\n29\t    url: str\n30\t\n31\t\n32\t@dataclass\n33\tclass Deployment:\n34\t    \"\"\"ARMOR deployment information.\"\"\"\n35\t    cluster: str\n36\t    image_tag: str\n37\t    filepath: str\n38\t\n39\t\n40\t@dataclass\n41\tclass DriftReport:\n42\t    \"\"\"Drift comparison report for a single is_correctness_drift: bool\n50\t    deployed_date: Optional[str]\n51\t    latest_date: Optional[str]\n52\t    filepath: str\n53\t\n54\t\n55\tdef parse_version(tag: str) -> Optional[int]:\n56\t    \"\"\"Parse version tag to integer (e.g., 'v0.1.42' -> 42, 'fcbf6d3' -> None).\"\"\"\n57\t    import re\n58\t    match = re.match(r'v?0\\.1\\.(\\d+)', tag)\n59\t    if match:\n60\t        return int(match.group(1))\n61\t    return None\n62\t\n63\t\n64\tdef calculate_releases_behind(deployed_version: Optional[int], releases: List[Release]) -> Optional[int]:\n65\t    \"\"\"Calculate how many releases a deployment is behind.\"\"\"\n66\t    if deployed_version is None:\n67\t        return None\n68\t\n69\t    # Count releases with version number greater than deployed\n70\t    releases_behind = 0\n71\t    for release in releases:\n72\t        release_version = parse_version(release.tag)\n73\t        if release_version and release_version > deployed_version:\n74\t            releases_behind += 1\n75\t\n76\t    return releases_behind if releases_behind > 0 else 0\n77\t\n78\t\n79\tdef calculate_days_behind(deployed_tag: str, releases: List[Release]) -> Optional[int]:\n80\t    \"\"\"Calculate days behind based on release dates.\"\"\"\n81\t    deployed_version = parse_version(deployed_tag)\n82\t    if deployed_version is None:\n83\t        return None\n84\t\n85\t    # Find the release that matches the deployed version\n86\t    deployed_release = None\n87\t    for release in releases:\n88\t        release_version = parse_version(release.tag)\n89\t        if release_version == deployed_version:\n90\t            deployed_release = release\n91\t            break\n92\t\n93\t    if not deployed_release:\n94\t        return None\n95\t\n96\t    # Find the latest release\n97\t    latest_release = max(releases, key=lambda r: datetime.fromisoformat(r.published_at.replace('Z', '+00:00')))\n98\t\n99\t    # Calculate days difference\n100\t    deployed_date = datetime.fromisoformat(deployed_release.published_at.replace('Z', '+00:00'))\n101\t    latest_date = datetime.fromisoformat(latest_release.published_at.replace('Z', '+00:00'))\n102\t\n103\t    days_diff = (latest_date - deployed_date).days\n104\t    return days_diff if days_diff > 0 else 0\n105\t\n106\t\n107\tdef check_correctness_drift(deployed_tag: str, releases: List[Release]) -> bool:\n108\t    \"\"\"Check if deployment is behind a correctness release.\"\"\"\n109\t    deployed_version = parse_version(deployed_tag)\n110\t    if deployed_version is None:\n111\t        return False\n112\t\n113\t    # Check if any correctness release exists with version > deployed_version\n114\t    for release in releases:\n115\t        release_version = parse_version(release.tag)\n116\t        if release_version and release_version > deployed_version and release.is_correctness:\n117\t            return True\n118\t\n119\t    return False\n120\t\n121\t\n122\tdef compare_drift(\n123\t    deployments: List[Deployment],\n124\t    releases: List[Release],\n125\t    releases_threshold: int,\n126\t    days_threshold: int\n127\t) -> List[DriftReport]:\n128\t    \"\"\"Compare deployments against releases and generate drift reports.\"\"\"\n129\t    if not releases:\n130\t        print(\"Warning: No releases found for comparison\", file=sys.stderr)\n131\t        return []\n132\t\n133\t    # Find the latest release by version number\n134\t    versioned_releases = [r for r in releases if parse_version(r.tag)]\n135\t    if not versioned_releases:\n136\t        print(\"Warning: No versioned releases found for comparison\", file=sys.stderr)\n137\t        # Use the most recent release by date instead\n138\t        latest_release = max(releases, key=lambda r: datetime.fromisoformat(r.published_at.replace('Z', '+00:00')))\n139\t    else:\n140\t        latest_release = max(versioned_releases, key=lambda r: parse_version(r.tag) or 0)\n141\t    latest_tag = latest_release.tag\n142\t\n143\t    reports = []\n144\t    for deployment in deployments:\n145\t        deployed_version = parse_version(deployment.image_tag)\n146\t\n147\t        # Calculate releases behind\n148\t        releases_behind = calculate_releases_behind(deployed_version, releases)\n149\t\n150\t        # Calculate days behind\n151\t        days_behind = calculate_days_behind(deployment.image_tag, releases)\n152\t\n153\t        # Check for correctness drift\n154\t        correctness_drift = check_correctness_drift(deployment.image_tag, python3\n\"\"\"\nARMOR Version Drift Comparison\n\nCompares deployed ARMOR versions against GitHub releases to detect drift.\nUses outputs from github-release-fetcher.py and find-armor-deployments.py.\n\nAcceptance Criteria:\n- Configurable thresholds (N releases, M days)\n- Returns structured report per cluster: {cluster, deployed_tag, latest_tag, releases_behind, days_behind, is_drift, is_correctness_drift}\n- Correctness drift gets highest priority flag\n- Machine-readable JSON output\n\"\"\"\n\nimport argparse\nimport json\nimport sys\nfrom datetime import datetime\nfrom typing import Dict, List, Optional\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\n\n\n@dataclass\nclass Release:\n    \"\"\"GitHub release information.\"\"\"\n    tag: str\n    published_at: str\n    is_correctness: bool\n    url: str\n\n\n@dataclass\nclass Deployment:\n    \"\"\"ARMOR deployment information.\"\"\"\n    cluster: str\n    image_tag: str\n    filepath: str\n\n\n@dataclass\nclass DriftReport:\n    \"\"\"Drift comparison report for a single deployment.\"\"\"\n    cluster: str\n    deployed_tag: str\n    latest_tag: str\n    releases_behind: Optional[int]\n    days_behind: Optional[int]\n    is_drift: bool\n    is_correctness_drift: bool\n    deployed_date: Optional[str]\n    latest_date: Optional[str]\n    filepath: str\n\n\ndef parse_version(tag: str) -> Optional[int]:\n    \"\"\"Parse version tag to integer (e.g., 'v0.1.42' -> 42, 'fcbf6d3' -> None).\"\"\"\n    import re\n    match = re.match(r'v?0\\.1\\.(\\d+)', tag)\n    if match:\n        return int(match.group(1))\n    return None\n\n\ndef calculate_releases_behind(deployed_version: Optional[int], releases: List[Release]) -> Optional[int]:\n    \"\"\"Calculate how many releases a deployment is behind.\"\"\"\n    if deployed_version is None:\n        return None\n\n    # Count releases with version number greater than deployed\n    releases_behind = 0\n    for release in releases:\n        release_version = parse_version(release.tag)\n        if release_version and release_version > deployed_version:\n            releases_behind += 1\n\n    return releases_behind if releases_behind > 0 else 0\n\n\ndef calculate_days_behind(deployed_tag: str, releases: List[Release]) -> Optional[int]:\n    \"\"\"Calculate days behind based on release dates.\"\"\"\n    deployed_version = parse_version(deployed_tag)\n    if deployed_version is None:\n        return None\n\n    # Find the release that matches the deployed version\n    deployed_release = None\n    for release in releases:\n        release_version = parse_version(release.tag)\n        if release_version == deployed_version:\n            deployed_release = release\n            break\n\n    if not deployed_release:\n        return None\n\n    # Find the latest release\n    latest_release = max(releases, key=lambda r: datetime.fromisoformat(r.published_at.replace('Z', '+00:00')))\n\n    # Calculate days difference\n    deployed_date = datetime.fromisoformat(deployed_release.published_at.replace('Z', '+00:00'))\n    latest_date = datetime.fromisoformat(latest_release.published_at.replace('Z', '+00:00'))\n\n    days_diff = (latest_date - deployed_date).days\n    return days_diff if days_diff > 0 else 0\n\n\ndef check_correctness_drift(deployed_tag: str, releases: List[Release]) -> bool:\n    \"\"\"Check if deployment is behind a correctness release.\"\"\"\n    deployed_version = parse_version(deployed_tag)\n    if deployed_version is None:\n        return False\n\n    # Check if any correctness release exists with version > deployed_version\n    for release in releases:\n        release_version = parse_version(release.tag)\n        if release_version and release_version > deployed_version and release.is_correctness:\n            return True\n\n    return False\n\n\ndef compare_drift(\n    deployments: List[Deployment],\n    releases: List[Release],\n    releases_threshold: int,\n    days_threshold: int\n) -> List[DriftReport]:\n    \"\"\"Compare deployments against releases and generate drift reports.\"\"\"\n    if not releases:\n        print(\"Warning: No releases found for comparison\", file=sys.stderr)\n        return []\n\n    # Find the latest release by version number\n    versioned_releases = [r for r in releases if parse_version(r.tag)]\n    if not versioned_releases:\n        print(\"Warning: No versioned releases found for comparison\", file=sys.stderr)\n        # Use the most recent release by date instead\n        latest_release = max(releases, key=lambda r: datetime.fromisoformat(r.published_at.replace('Z', '+00:00')))\n    else:\n        latest_release = max(versioned_releases, key=lambda r: parse_version(r.tag) or 0)\n    latest_tag = latest_release.tag\n\n    reports = []\n    for deployment in deployments:\n        deployed_version = parse_version(deployment.image_tag)\n\n        # Calculate releases behind\n        releases_behind = calculate_releases_behind(deployed_version, releases)\n\n        # Calculate days behind\n        days_behind = calculate_days_behind(deployment.image_tag, releases)\n\n        # Check for correctness drift\n        correctness_drift = check_correctness_drift(deployment.image_tag, releases)\n\n        # Determine if drift exceeds thresholds\n        is_drift = (\n            (releases_behind is not None and releases_behind >= releases_threshold) or\n            (days_behind is not None and days_behind >= days_threshold) or\n            correctness_drift\n        )\n\n        # Get deployed date\n        deployed_date = None\n        if deployed_version is not None:\n            for release in releases:\n                release_version = parse_version(release.tag)\n                if release_version == = DriftReport(\n            cluster=deployment.cluster,\n            deployed_tag=deployment.image_tag,\n            latest_tag=latest_tag,\n            releases_behind=releases_behind,\n            days_behind=days_behind,\n            is_drift=is_drift,\n            is_correctness_drift=correctness_drift,\n            deployed_date=deployed_date,\n            latest_date=latest_date,\n            filepath=deployment.filepath\n        )\n\n        reports.append(report)\n\n    return reports\n\n\ndef main():\n    \"\"\"Main entry point.\"\"\"\n    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(\n        description='Compare ARMOR deployments against GitHub releases to detect version drift'\n    )\n    parser.add_argument(\n        '--deployments',\n        required=True,\n        help='Path to JSON file containing deployments output from find-armor-deployments.py'\n    )\n    parser.add_argument(\n        '--releases',\n        required=True,\n        help='Path to JSON file containing releases output from github-release-fetcher.py'\n    )\n    parser.add_argument(\n        '--releases-threshold',\n        type=int,\n        default=50,\n        help='Flag deployments behind by N or more releases (default: 50)'\n    )\n    parser.add_argument(\n        '--days-threshold',\n        type=int,\n        default=30,\n        help='Flag deployments behind by M or more days (default: 30)'\n    )\n    parser.add_argument(\n        '--json',\n        action='store_true',\n        help='Output machine-readable JSON instead of human-readable format'\n    )\n    parser.add_argument(\n        '--sort-by',\n        choices=['cluster', 'releases', 'days', 'correctness'],\n        default='cluster',\n        help='Sort output by field (default: cluster)'\n    )\n\n    args = parser.parse_args()\n\n    # Load deployments\n    try:\n        with open(args.deployments, 'r') as f:\n            deployments_data = json.load(f)\n        deployments = [Deployment(**d) for d in deployments_data]\n    except Exception as e:\n        print(f\"Error loading deployments: {e}\", file=sys.stderr)\n        sys.exit(1)\n\n    # Load releases\n    try:\n        with open(args.releases, 'r') as f:\n            releases_data = json.load(f)\n        releases = [Release(**r) for r in releases_data]\n    except Exception as e:\n        print(f\"Error loading releases: {e}\", file=sys.stderr)\n        sys.exit(1)\n\n    # Compare drift\n    reports = compare_drift(\n        deployments,\n        releases,\n        args.releases_threshold,\n        args.days_threshold\n    )\n\n    # Sort reports\n    if args.sort_by == 'cluster':\n        reports.sort(key=lambda r: r.cluster)\n    elif args.sort_by == 'releases':\n        reports.sort(key=lambda r: r.releases_behind or 0, reverse=True)\n    elif args.sort_by == 'days':\n        reports.sort(key=lambda r: r.days_behind or 0, reverse=True)\n    elif args.sort_by == 'correctness':\n        reports.sort(key=lambda r: r.is_correctness_drift, reverse=True)\n\n    # Output\n    if args.json:\n        output_json(reports, args.releases_threshold, args.days_threshold)\n    else:\n        output_human_readable(reports, args.releases_threshold, args.days_threshold)\n\n\ndef output_json(reports: List[DriftReport], releases_threshold: int, days_threshold: int):\n    \"\"\"Output machine-readable JSON.\"\"\"\n    output = {\n        \"thresholds\": {\n            \"releases\": releases_threshold,\n            \"days\": days_threshold\n        },\n        \"summary\": {\n            \"total_deployments\": len(reports),\n            \"with_drift\": sum(1 for r in reports if r.is_drift),\n            \"with_correctness_drift\": sum(1 for r in reports if r.is_correctness_drift)\n        },\n        \"deployments\": []\n    }\n\n    for report in reports:\n        deployment_dict = {\n            \"cluster\": report.cluster,\n            \"deployed_tag\": report.deployed_tag,\n            \"latest_tag\": report.latest_tag,\n            \"releases_behind\": report.releases_behind,\n            \"days_behind\": report.days_behind,\n            \"is_drift\": report.is_drift,\n            \"is_correctness_drift\": report.is_correctness_drift,\n            \"deployed_date\": report.deployed_date,\n            \"latest_date\": report.latest_date,\n            \"filepath\": report.filepath\n        }\n        output[\"deployments\"].append(deployment_dict)\n\n    print(json.dumps(output, indent=2))\n\n\ndef output_human_readable(reports: List[DriftReport], releases_threshold: int, days_threshold: int):\n    \"\"\"Output human-readable summary.\"\"\"\n    print(\"=\" * 80)\n    print(\"ARMOR Version Drift Comparison\")\n    print(\"=\" * 80)\n    print(f\"Thresholds: > {releases_threshold} releases, > {days_threshold} days\")\n    print()\n\n    # Print individual reports\n    for report in reports:\n        status_icon = \"🔴\" if report.is_correctness_drift else (\"🟡\" if report.is_drift else \"✅\")\n\n        print(f\"{status_icon} {report.cluster}\")\n        print(f\"   Deployed: {report.deployed_tag}\")\n        print(f\"   Latest:   {report.latest_tag}\")\n\n        if report.releases_behind is not None:\n            print(f\"   Releases behind: str","originalFile":"#!/usr/bin/env python3\n\"\"\"\nARMOR Version Drift Comparison\n\nCompares deployed ARMOR versions against GitHub releases to detect drift.\nUses outputs from github-release-fetcher.py and find-armor-deployments.py.\n\nAcceptance Criteria:\n- Configurable thresholds (N releases, M days)\n- Returns structured report per cluster: {cluster, deployed_tag, latest_tag, releases_behind, days_behind, is_drift, is_correctness_drift}\n- Correctness drift gets highest priority flag\n- Machine-readable JSON output\n\"\"\"\n\nimport argparse\nimport json\nimport sys\nfrom datetime import datetime\nfrom typing import Dict, List, Optional\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\n\n\n@dataclass\nclass Release:\n    \"\"\"GitHub release information.\"\"\"\n    tag: str\n    published_at: str\n    is_correctness: bool\n    url: str\n\n\n@dataclass\nclass Deployment:\n    \"\"\"ARMOR deployment information.\"\"\"\n    cluster: str\n    image_tag: str\n    filepath: str\n\n\n@dataclass\nclass DriftReport:\n    \"\"\"Drift comparison report for a single deployment.\"\"\"\n    cluster: str\n    deployed_tag: str\n    latest_tag: str\n    releases_behind: Optional[int]\n    days_behind: Optional[int]\n    is_drift: bool\n    is_correctness_drift: bool\n    deployed_date: Optional[str]\n    latest_date: Optional[str]\n    filepath: str\n\n\ndef parse_version(tag: str) -> Optional[int]:\n    \"\"\"Parse version tag to integer (e.g., 'v0.1.42' -> 42, 'fcbf6d3' -> None).\"\"\"\n    import re\n    match = re.match(r'v?0\\.1\\.(\\d+)', tag)\n    if match:\n        return int(match.group(1))\n    return None\n\n\ndef calculate_releases_behind(deployed_version: Optional[int], releases: List[Release]) -> Optional[int]:\n    \"\"\"Calculate how many releases a deployment is behind.\"\"\"\n    if deployed_version is None:\n        return None\n\n    # Count releases with version number greater than deployed\n    releases_behind = 0\n    for release in releases:\n        release_version = parse_version(release.tag)\n        if release_version and release_version > deployed_version:\n            releases_behind += 1\n\n    return releases_behind if releases_behind > 0 else 0\n\n\ndef calculate_days_behind(deployed_tag: str, releases: List[Release]) -> Optional[int]:\n    \"\"\"Calculate days behind based on release dates.\"\"\"\n    deployed_version = parse_version(deployed_tag)\n    if deployed_version is None:\n        return None\n\n    # Find the release that matches the deployed version\n    deployed_release = None\n    for release in releases:\n        release_version = parse_version(release.tag)\n        if release_version == deployed_version:\n            deployed_release = release\n            break\n\n    if not deployed_release:\n        return None\n\n    # Find the latest release\n    latest_release = max(releases, key=lambda r: datetime.fromisoformat(r.published_at.replace('Z', '+00:00')))\n\n    # Calculate days difference\n    deployed_date = datetime.fromisoformat(deployed_release.published_at.replace('Z', '+00:00'))\n    latest_date = datetime.fromisoformat(latest_release.published_at.replace('Z', '+00:00'))\n\n    days_diff = (latest_date - deployed_date).days\n    return days_diff if days_diff > 0 else 0\n\n\ndef check_correctness_drift(deployed_tag: str, releases: List[Release]) -> bool:\n    \"\"\"Check if deployment is behind a correctness release.\"\"\"\n    deployed_version = parse_version(deployed_tag)\n    if deployed_version is None:\n        return False\n\n    # Check if any correctness release exists with version > deployed_version\n    for release in releases:\n        release_version = parse_version(release.tag)\n        if release_version and release_version > deployed_version and release.is_correctness:\n            return True\n\n    return False\n\n\ndef compare_drift(\n    deployments: List[Deployment],\n    releases: List[Release],\n    releases_threshold: int,\n    days_threshold: int\n) -> List[DriftReport]:\n    \"\"\"Compare deployments against releases and generate drift reports.\"\"\"\n    if not releases:\n        print(\"Warning: No releases found for comparison\", file=sys.stderr)\n        return []\n\n    # Find the latest release by version number\n    versioned_releases = [r for r in releases if parse_version(r.tag)]\n    if not versioned_releases:\n        print(\"Warning: No versioned releases found for comparison\", file=sys.stderr)\n        # Use the most recent release by date instead\n        latest_release = max(releases, key=lambda r: datetime.fromisoformat(r.published_at.replace('Z', '+00:00')))\n    else:\n        latest_release = max(versioned_releases, key=lambda r: parse_version(r.tag) or 0)\n    latest_tag = latest_release.tag\n\n    reports = []\n    for deployment in deployments:\n        deployed_version = parse_version(deployment.image_tag)\n\n        # Calculate releases behind\n        releases_behind = calculate_releases_behind(deployed_version, releases)\n\n        # Calculate days behind\n        days_behind = calculate_days_behind(deployment.image_tag, releases)\n\n        # Check for correctness drift\n        correctness_drift = check_correctness_drift(deployment.image_tag, releases)\n\n        # Determine if drift exceeds thresholds\n        is_drift = (\n            (releases_behind is not None and releases_behind >= releases_threshold) or\n            (days_behind is not None and days_behind >= days_threshold) or\n            correctness_drift\n        )\n\n        # Get deployed date\n        deployed_date = None\n        if deployed_version is not None:\n            for release in releases:\n                release_version = parse_version(release.tag)\n                if release_version == deployed_version:\n                    deployed_date = release.published_at\n                    break\n\n        # Get latest date\n        latest_date = latest_release.published_at\n\n        report = DriftReport(\n            cluster=deployment.cluster,\n            deployed_tag=deployment.image_tag,\n            latest_tag=latest_tag,\n            releases_behind=releases_behind,\n            days_behind=days_behind,\n            is_drift=is_drift,\n            is_correctness_drift=correctness_drift,\n            deployed_date=deployed_date,\n            latest_date=latest_date,\n            filepath=deployment.filepath\n        )\n\n        reports.append(report)\n\n    return reports\n\n\ndef main():\n    \"\"\"Main entry point.\"\"\"\n    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(\n        description='Compare ARMOR deployments against GitHub releases to detect version drift'\n    )\n    parser.add_argument(\n        '--deployments',\n        required=True,\n        help='Path to JSON file containing deployments output from find-armor-deployments.py'\n    )\n    parser.add_argument(\n        '--releases',\n        required=True,\n        help='Path to JSON file containing releases output from github-release-fetcher.py'\n    )\n    parser.add_argument(\n        '--releases-threshold',\n        type=int,\n        default=50,\n        help='Flag deployments behind by N or more releases (default: 50)'\n    )\n    parser.add_argument(\n        '--days-threshold',\n        type=int,\n        default=30,\n        help='Flag deployments behind by M or more days (default: 30)'\n    )\n    parser.add_argument(\n        '--json',\n        action='store_true',\n        help='Output machine-readable JSON instead of human-readable format'\n    )\n    parser.add_argument(\n        '--sort-by',\n        choices=['cluster', 'releases', 'days', 'correctness'],\n        default='cluster',\n        help='Sort output by field (default: cluster)'\n    )\n\n    args = parser.parse_args()\n\n    # Load deployments\n    try:\n        with open(args.deployments, 'r') as f:\n            deployments_data = json.load(f)\n        deployments = [Deployment(**d) for d in deployments_data]\n    except Exception as e:\n        print(f\"Error loading deployments: {e}\", file=sys.stderr)\n        sys.exit(1)\n\n    # Load releases\n    try:\n        with open(args.releases, 'r') as f:\n            releases_data = json.load(f)\n        releases = [Release(**r) for r in releases_data]\n    except Exception as e:\n        print(f\"Error loading releases: {e}\", file=sys.stderr)\n        sys.exit(1)\n\n    # Compare drift\n    reports = compare_drift(\n        deployments,\n        releases,\n        args.releases_threshold,\n        args.days_threshold\n    )\n\n    # Sort reports\n    if args.sort_by == 'cluster':\n        reports.sort(key=lambda r: r.cluster)\n    elif args.sort_by == 'releases':\n        reports.sort(key=lambda r: r.releases_behind or 0, reverse=True)\n    elif args.sort_by == 'days':\n        reports.sort(key=lambda r: r.days_behind or 0, reverse=True)\n    elif args.sort_by == 'correctness':\n        reports.sort(key=lambda r: r.is_correctness_drift, reverse=True)\n\n    # Output\n    if args.json:\n        output_json(reports, args.releases_threshold, args.days_threshold)\n    else:\n        output_human_readable(reports, args.releases_threshold, args.days_threshold)\n\n\ndef output_json(reports: List[DriftReport], releases_threshold: int, days_threshold: int):\n    \"\"\"Output machine-readable JSON.\"\"\"\n    output = {\n        \"thresholds\": {\n            \"releases\": releases_threshold,\n            \"days\": days_threshold\n        },\n        \"summary\": {\n            \"total_deployments\": len(reports),\n            \"with_drift\": sum(1 for r in reports if r.is_drift),\n            \"with_correctness_drift\": sum(1 for r in reports if r.is_correctness_drift)\n        },\n        \"deployments\": []\n    }\n\n    for report in reports:\n        deployment_dict = {\n            \"cluster\": report.cluster,\n str\n\n\ndef parse_version(tag: str) -> Optional[int]:\n    \"\"\"Parse version tag to integer (e.g., 'v0.1.42' -> 42, 'fcbf6d3' -> None).\"\"\"\n    import re\n    match = re.match(r'v?0\\.1\\.(\\d+)', tag)\n    if match:\n        return int(match.group(1))\n    return None\n\n\ndef calculate_releases_behind(deployed_version: Optional[int], releases: List[Release]) -> Optional[int]:\n    \"\"\"Calculate how many releases a deployment is behind.\"\"\"\n    if deployed_version is None:\n        return None\n\n    # Count releases with version number greater than deployed\n    releases_behind = 0\n    for release in releases:\n        release_version = parse_version(release.tag)\n        if release_version and release_version > deployed_version:\n behind based on release dates.\"\"\"\n    deployed_version = parse_version(deployed_tag)\n    if deployed_version is None:\n        return None\n\n    # Find the release that matches the deployed version\n    deployed_release = None\n    for release in releases:\n        release_version = parse_version(release.tag)\n        if release_version == deployed_version:\n            deployed_release datetime.fromisoformat(r.published_at.replace('Z', '+00:00')))\n\n    # Calculate days difference\n    deployed_date = datetime.fromisoformat(deployed_release.published_at.replace('Z', '+00:00'))\n    latest_date = datetime.fromisoformat(latest_release.published_at.replace('Z', '+00:00'))\n\n    days_diff = (latest_date - deployed_date).days\n    return days_diff if days_diff > 0 else 0\n\n\ndef deployments: List[Deployment],\n    releases: List[Release],\n    releases_threshold: int,\n    days_threshold: int\n) -> List[DriftReport]:\n    \"\"\"Compare deployments against releases and days behind\n        days_behind = calculate_days_behind(deployment.image_tag, releases)\n\n        # Check for correctness drift\n        correctness_drift = description='Compare ARMOR deployments against GitHub releases to detect version drift'\n    )\n    parser.add_argument(\n        '--deployments',\n        required=True,\n        help='Path to JSON '--sort-by',\n        choices=['cluster', 'releases', 'days', 'correctness'],\n        default='cluster',\n        help='Sort output by field (default: cluster)'\n    )\n\n    args = parser.parse_args()\n\n    # Load deployments\n    try:\n        with open(args.deployments, 'r') as f:\n            deployments_data = json.load(f)\n        deployments = [Deployment(**d) for d in deployments_data]\n    except Exception as e:\n        print(f\"Error loading deployments: {e}\", file=sys.stderr)\n        sys.exit(1)\n\n    # Load releases\n    try:\n        with open(args.releases, 'r') as f:\n            releases_data = json.load(f)\n        releases = [Release(**r) for r in releases_data]\n    except Exception as e:\n        print(f\"Error loading releases: {e}\", file=sys.stderr)\n        sys.exit(1)\n\n    # Compare drift\n    reports = compare_drift(\n        deployments,\n        releases,\n        args.releases_threshold,\n        args.days_threshold\n    )\n\n    # Sort reports\n    if args.sort_by == 'cluster':\n        reports.sort(key=lambda r: r.cluster)\n    elif args.sort_by == 'releases':\n        reports.sort(key=lambda r: r.releases_behind or 0, reverse=True)\n    elif args.sort_by == 'days':\n        reports.sort(key=lambda r: r.days_behind or 0, reverse=True)\n    elif args.sort_by == 'correctness':\n        reports.sort(key=lambda r: r.is_correctness_drift, reverse=True)\n\n    # Output\n    if args.json:\n        output_json(reports, args.releases_threshold, get_missed_correctness_releases(deployment.image_tag, releases)","originalFile":"#!/usr/bin/env python3\n\"\"\"\nARMOR Version Drift Comparison\n\nCompares deployed ARMOR versions against GitHub releases to detect drift.\nUses outputs from github-release-fetcher.py and find-armor-deployments.py.\n\nAcceptance Criteria:\n- Configurable thresholds (N releases, M days)\n- Returns structured report per cluster: {cluster, deployed_tag, latest_tag, releases_behind, days_behind, is_drift, is_correctness_drift}\n- Correctness drift gets highest priority flag\n- Machine-readable JSON output\n\"\"\"\n\nimport argparse\nimport json\nimport sys\nfrom datetime import datetime\nfrom typing import Dict, List, Optional\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\n\n\n@dataclass\nclass Release:\n    \"\"\"GitHub release information.\"\"\"\n    tag: str\n    published_at: str\n    is_correctness: bool\n    url: str\n\n\n@dataclass\nclass Deployment:\n    \"\"\"ARMOR deployment information.\"\"\"\n    cluster: str\n    image_tag: str\n    filepath: str\n\n\n@dataclass\nclass DriftReport:\n    \"\"\"Drift comparison report for a single deployment.\"\"\"\n    cluster: str\n    deployed_tag: str\n    latest_tag: str\n    releases_behind: Optional[int]\n    days_behind: Optional[int]\n    is_drift: bool\n    is_correctness_drift: bool\n    missed_correctness_releases: List[str]\n    deployed_date: Optional[str]\n    latest_date: Optional[str]\n    filepath: str\n\n\ndef parse_version(tag: str) -> Optional[int]:\n    \"\"\"Parse version tag to integer (e.g., 'v0.1.42' -> 42, 'fcbf6d3' -> None).\"\"\"\n    import re\n    match = re.match(r'v?0\\.1\\.(\\d+)', tag)\n    if match:\n        return int(match.group(1))\n    return None\n\n\ndef calculate_releases_behind(deployed_version: Optional[int], releases: List[Release]) -> Optional[int]:\n    \"\"\"Calculate how many releases a deployment is behind.\"\"\"\n    if deployed_version is None:\n        return None\n\n    # Count releases with version number greater than deployed\n    releases_behind = 0\n    for release in releases:\n        release_version = parse_version(release.tag)\n        if release_version and release_version > deployed_version:\n            releases_behind += 1\n\n    return releases_behind if releases_behind > 0 else 0\n\n\ndef calculate_days_behind(deployed_tag: str, releases: List[Release]) -> Optional[int]:\n    \"\"\"Calculate days behind based on release dates.\"\"\"\n    deployed_version = parse_version(deployed_tag)\n    if deployed_version is None:\n        return None\n\n    # Find the release that matches the deployed version\n    deployed_release = None\n    for release in releases:\n        release_version = parse_version(release.tag)\n        if release_version == deployed_version:\n            deployed_release = release\n            break\n\n    if not deployed_release:\n        return None\n\n    # Find the latest release\n    latest_release = max(releases, key=lambda r: datetime.fromisoformat(r.published_at.replace('Z', '+00:00')))\n\n    # Calculate days difference\n    deployed_date = datetime.fromisoformat(deployed_release.published_at.replace('Z', '+00:00'))\n    latest_date = datetime.fromisoformat(latest_release.published_at.replace('Z', '+00:00'))\n\n    days_diff = (latest_date - deployed_date).days\n    return days_diff if days_diff > 0 else 0\n\n\ndef check_correctness_drift(deployed_tag: str, releases: List[Release]) -> bool:\n    \"\"\"Check if deployment is behind a correctness release.\"\"\"\n    missed = get_missed_correctness_releases(deployed_tag, releases)\n    return len(missed) > 0\n\n\ndef get_missed_correctness_releases(deployed_tag: str, releases: List[Release]) -> List[str]:\n    \"\"\"Get list of correctness release tags that are newer than the deployed version.\"\"\"\n    deployed_version = parse_version(deployed_tag)\n    if deployed_version is None:\n        return []\n\n    # Collect all correctness releases with version > deployed_version\n    missed_releases = []\n    for release in releases:\n        release_version = parse_version(release.tag)\n        if release_version and release_version > deployed_version and release.is_correctness:\n            missed_releases.append(release.tag)\n\n    return missed_releases\n\n\ndef compare_drift(\n    deployments: List[Deployment],\n    releases: List[Release],\n    releases_threshold: int,\n    days_threshold: int\n) -> List[DriftReport]:\n    \"\"\"Compare deployments against releases and generate drift reports.\"\"\"\n    if not releases:\n        print(\"Warning: No releases found for comparison\", file=sys.stderr)\n        return []\n\n    # Find the latest release by version number\n    versioned_releases = [r for r in releases if parse_version(r.tag)]\n    if not versioned_releases:\n        print(\"Warning: No versioned releases found for comparison\", file=sys.stderr)\n        # Use the most recent release by date instead\n        latest_release = max(releases, key=lambda r: datetime.fromisoformat(r.published_at.replace('Z', '+00:00')))\n    else:\n        latest_release = max(versioned_releases, key=lambda r: parse_version(r.tag) or 0)\n    latest_tag = latest_release.tag\n\n    reports = []\n    for deployment in deployments:\n        deployed_version = parse_version(deployment.image_tag)\n\n        # Calculate releases behind\n        releases_behind = calculate_releases_behind(deployed_version, releases)\n\n        # Calculate days behind\n        days_behind = calculate_days_behind(deployment.image_tag, releases)\n\n        # Check for correctness drift\n        correctness_drift = check_correctness_drift(deployment.image_tag, releases)\n\n        # Determine if drift exceeds thresholds\n        is_drift = (\n            (releases_behind is not None and releases_behind >= releases_threshold) or\n            (days_behind is not None and days_behind >= days_threshold) or\n            correctness_drift\n        )\n\n        # Get deployed date\n        deployed_date = None\n        if deployed_version is not None:\n            for release in releases:\n                release_version = parse_version(release.tag)\n                if release_version == deployed_version:\n                    deployed_date = release.published_at\n                    break\n\n        # Get latest date\n        latest_date = latest_release.published_at\n\n        report = DriftReport(\n            cluster=deployment.cluster,\n            deployed_tag=deployment.image_tag,\n            latest_tag=latest_tag,\n            releases_behind=releases_behind,\n            days_behind=days_behind,\n            is_drift=is_drift,\n            is_correctness_drift=correctness_drift,\n            deployed_date=deployed_date,\n            latest_date=latest_date,\n            filepath=deployment.filepath\n        )\n\n        reports.append(report)\n\n    return reports\n\n\ndef main():\n    \"\"\"Main entry point.\"\"\"\n    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(\n        description='Compare ARMOR deployments against GitHub releases to detect version drift'\n    )\n    parser.add_argument(\n        '--deployments',\n        required=True,\n        help='Path to JSON file containing deployments output from find-armor-deployments.py'\n    )\n    parser.add_argument(\n        '--releases',\n        required=True,\n        help='Path to JSON file containing releases output from github-release-fetcher.py'\n    )\n    parser.add_argument(\n        '--releases-threshold',\n        type=int,\n        default=50,\n        help='Flag deployments behind by N or more releases (default: 50)'\n    )\n    parser.add_argument(\n        '--days-threshold',\n        type=int,\n        default=30,\n        help='Flag deployments behind by M or more days (default: 30)'\n    )\n    parser.add_argument(\n        '--json',\n        action='store_true',\n        help='Output machine-readable JSON instead of human-readable format'\n    )\n    parser.add_argument(\n        '--sort-by',\n        choices=['cluster', 'releases', 'days', 'correctness'],\n        default='cluster',\n        help='Sort output by field (default: cluster)'\n    )\n\n    args = parser.parse_args()\n\n    # Load deployments\n    try:\n        with open(args.deployments, 'r') as f:\n            deployments_data = json.load(f)\n        deployments = [Deployment(**d) for d in deployments_data]\n    except Exception as e:\n        print(f\"Error loading deployments: {e}\", file=sys.stderr)\n        sys.exit(1)\n\n    # Load releases\n    try:\n        with open(args.releases, 'r') as f:\n            releases_data = json.load(f)\n        releases = [Release(**r) for r in releases_data]\n    except Exception as e:\n        print(f\"Error loading releases: {e}\", file=sys.stderr)\n        sys.exit(1)\n\n    # Compare drift\n    reports = compare_drift(\n        deployments,\n        releases,\n        args.releases_threshold,\n        args.days_threshold\n    )\n\n    # Sort reports\n    if args.sort_by == 'cluster':\n        reports.sort(key=lambda r: r.cluster)\n    elif args.sort_by == 'releases':\n        reports.sort(key=lambda r: r.releases_behind or 0, reverse=True)\n    elif args.sort_by == 'days':\n        reports.sort(key=lambda r: r.days_behind or 0, reverse=True)\n    elif args.sort_by == 'correctness':\n        reports.sort(key=lambda r: r.is_correctness_drift, reverse=True)\n\n    # Output\n    if args.json:\n        output_json(reports, args.releases_threshold, args.days_threshold)\n    else:\n        output_human_readable(reports, args.releases_threshold, args.days_threshold)\n\n\ndef output_json(reports: List[DriftReport], releases_threshold: int, days_threshold: int):\n    \"\"\"Output machine-readable JSON.\"\"\"\n    output = {\n        \"thresholds\": {\n            \"releases\": releases_threshold,\n            \"days\": days_threshold\n        },\n        \"summary\": {\n            \"total_deployments\": len(reports),\n            \"with_drift\": sum(1 for r in reports if r.is_drift),\n            \"with_correctness_drift\": sum(1 for r in reports if r.is_correctness_drift)\n        },\n        \"deployments\": []\n    }\n\n    for report in reports:\n        deployment_dict = {\n            \"cluster\": report.cluster,\n            \"deployed_tag\": report.deployed_tag,\n            \"latest_tag\": report.latest_tag,\n            \"releases_behind\": report.releases_behind,\n            \"days_behind\": report.days_behind,\n            \"is_drift\": report.is_drift,\n            \"is_correctness_drift\": report.is_correctness_drift,\n            \"deployed_date\": report.deployed_date,\n            \"latest_date\": report.latest_date,\n            \"filepath\": report.filepath\n        }\n        output[\"deployments\"].append(deployment_dict)\n\n    print(json.dumps(output, indent=2))\n\n\ndef output_human_readable(reports: List[DriftReport], releases_threshold: int, days_threshold: int):\n    \"\"\"Output human-readable summary.\"\"\"\n    print(\"=\" * 80)\n    print(\"ARMOR Version Drift Comparison\")\n    print(\"=\" * 80)\n    print(f\"Thresholds: > {releases_threshold} releases, > {days_threshold} days\")\n    print()\n\n    # Print individual reports\n    for report in reports:\n        status_icon = \"🔴\" if report.is_correctness_drift else (\"🟡\" if report.is_drift else \"✅\")\n\n        print(f\"{status_icon} {report.cluster}\")\n        print(f\"   Deployed: filepath=deployment.filepath\n        )","originalFile":"#!/usr/bin/env python3\n\"\"\"\nARMOR Version Drift Comparison\n\nCompares deployed ARMOR versions against GitHub releases to detect drift.\nUses outputs from github-release-fetcher.py and find-armor-deployments.py.\n\nAcceptance Criteria:\n- Configurable thresholds (N releases, M days)\n- Returns structured report per cluster: {cluster, deployed_tag, latest_tag, releases_behind, days_behind, is_drift, is_correctness_drift}\n- Correctness drift gets highest priority flag\n- Machine-readable JSON output\n\"\"\"\n\nimport argparse\nimport json\nimport sys\nfrom datetime import datetime\nfrom typing import Dict, List, Optional\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\n\n\n@dataclass\nclass Release:\n    \"\"\"GitHub release information.\"\"\"\n    tag: str\n    published_at: str\n    is_correctness: bool\n    url: str\n\n\n@dataclass\nclass Deployment:\n    \"\"\"ARMOR deployment information.\"\"\"\n    cluster: str\n    image_tag: str\n    filepath: str\n\n\n@dataclass\nclass DriftReport:\n    \"\"\"Drift comparison report for a single deployment.\"\"\"\n    cluster: str\n    deployed_tag: str\n    latest_tag: str\n    releases_behind: Optional[int]\n    days_behind: Optional[int]\n    is_drift: bool\n    is_correctness_drift: bool\n    missed_correctness_releases: List[str]\n    deployed_date: Optional[str]\n    latest_date: Optional[str]\n    filepath: str\n\n\ndef parse_version(tag: str) -> Optional[int]:\n    \"\"\"Parse version tag to integer (e.g., 'v0.1.42' -> 42, 'fcbf6d3' -> None).\"\"\"\n    import re\n    match = re.match(r'v?0\\.1\\.(\\d+)', tag)\n    if match:\n        return int(match.group(1))\n    return None\n\n\ndef calculate_releases_behind(deployed_version: Optional[int], releases: List[Release]) -> Optional[int]:\n    \"\"\"Calculate how many releases a deployment is behind.\"\"\"\n    if deployed_version is None:\n        return None\n\n    # Count releases with version number greater than deployed\n    releases_behind = 0\n    for release in releases:\n        release_version = parse_version(release.tag)\n        if release_version and release_version > deployed_version:\n            releases_behind += 1\n\n    return releases_behind if releases_behind > 0 else 0\n\n\ndef calculate_days_behind(deployed_tag: str, releases: List[Release]) -> Optional[int]:\n    \"\"\"Calculate days behind based on release dates.\"\"\"\n    deployed_version = parse_version(deployed_tag)\n    if deployed_version is None:\n        return None\n\n    # Find the release that matches the deployed version\n    deployed_release = None\n    for release in releases:\n        release_version = parse_version(release.tag)\n        if release_version == deployed_version:\n            deployed_release = release\n            break\n\n    if not deployed_release:\n        return None\n\n    # Find the latest release\n    latest_release = max(releases, key=lambda r: datetime.fromisoformat(r.published_at.replace('Z', '+00:00')))\n\n    # Calculate days difference\n    deployed_date = datetime.fromisoformat(deployed_release.published_at.replace('Z', '+00:00'))\n    latest_date = datetime.fromisoformat(latest_release.published_at.replace('Z', '+00:00'))\n\n    days_diff = (latest_date - deployed_date).days\n    return days_diff if days_diff > 0 else 0\n\n\ndef check_correctness_drift(deployed_tag: str, releases: List[Release]) -> bool:\n    \"\"\"Check if deployment is behind a correctness release.\"\"\"\n    missed = get_missed_correctness_releases(deployed_tag, releases)\n    return len(missed) > 0\n\n\ndef get_missed_correctness_releases(deployed_tag: str, releases: List[Release]) -> List[str]:\n    \"\"\"Get list of correctness release tags that are newer than the deployed version.\"\"\"\n    deployed_version = parse_version(deployed_tag)\n    if deployed_version is None:\n        return []\n\n    # Collect all correctness releases with version > deployed_version\n    missed_releases = []\n    for release in releases:\n        release_version = parse_version(release.tag)\n        if release_version and release_version > deployed_version and release.is_correctness:\n            missed_releases.append(release.tag)\n\n    return missed_releases\n\n\ndef compare_drift(\n    deployments: List[Deployment],\n    releases: List[Release],\n    releases_threshold: int,\n    days_threshold: int\n) -> List[DriftReport]:\n    \"\"\"Compare deployments against releases and generate drift reports.\"\"\"\n    if not releases:\n        print(\"Warning: No releases found for comparison\", file=sys.stderr)\n        return []\n\n    # Find the latest release by version number\n    versioned_releases = [r for r in releases if parse_version(r.tag)]\n    if not versioned_releases:\n        print(\"Warning: No versioned releases found for comparison\", file=sys.stderr)\n        # Use the most recent release by date instead\n        latest_release = max(releases, key=lambda r: datetime.fromisoformat(r.published_at.replace('Z', '+00:00')))\n    else:\n        latest_release = max(versioned_releases, key=lambda r: parse_version(r.tag) or 0)\n    latest_tag = latest_release.tag\n\n    reports = []\n    for deployment in deployments:\n drift.\nUses outputs from github-release-fetcher.py and find-armor-deployments.py.\n\nAcceptance Criteria:\n- Configurable thresholds (N releases, M days)\n- Returns structured report per cluster: {cluster, deployed_tag, latest_tag, releases_behind, days_behind, is_drift, is_correctness_drift}\n- Correctness drift gets highest priority flag\n- Machine-readable JSON output\n\"\"\"\n\nimport argparse\nimport json\nimport sys\nfrom datetime import datetime\nfrom typing import Dict, List, Optional\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\n\n\n@dataclass\nclass Release:\n    \"\"\"GitHub release information.\"\"\"\n    tag: str\n    published_at: str\n    is_correctness: bool\n    url: str\n\n\n@dataclass\nclass Deployment:\n    \"\"\"ARMOR deployment information.\"\"\"\n    cluster: str\n    image_tag: str\n    filepath: str\n\n\n@dataclass\nclass DriftReport:\n    \"\"\"Drift comparison report for a single deployment.\"\"\"\n    cluster: str\n    deployed_tag: str\n    latest_tag: str\n    releases_behind: Optional[int]\n    days_behind: Optional[int]\n    is_drift: bool\n    is_correctness_drift: bool\n    missed_correctness_releases: List[str]\n    deployed_date: Optional[str]\n    latest_date: Optional[str]\n    filepath: str\n\n\ndef parse_version(tag: str) -> Optional[int]:\n    \"\"\"Parse version tag to integer (e.g., 'v0.1.42' -> 42, 'fcbf6d3' -> None).\"\"\"\n    import re\n    match = re.match(r'v?0\\.1\\.(\\d+)', tag)\n    if match:\n        return int(match.group(1))\n    return None\n\n\ndef calculate_releases_behind(deployed_version: Optional[int], releases: List[Release]) -> Optional[int]:\n    \"\"\"Calculate how many releases a deployment is behind.\"\"\"\n    if deployed_version is None:\n        return None\n\n    # Count releases with version number greater than deployed\n    releases_behind = 0\n    for release in releases:\n        release_version = parse_version(release.tag)\n        if release_version and release_version > deployed_version:\n            releases_behind += 1\n\n    return releases_behind if releases_behind > 0 else 0\n\n\ndef calculate_days_behind(deployed_tag: str, releases: List[Release]) -> Optional[int]:\n    \"\"\"Calculate days behind based on release dates.\"\"\"\n    deployed_version = parse_version(deployed_tag)\n    if deployed_version is None:\n        return None\n\n    # Find the release that matches the deployed version\n    deployed_release = None\n    for release in releases:\n        release_version = parse_version(release.tag)\n        if release_version == deployed_version:\n            deployed_release = release\n            break\n\n    if not deployed_release:\n        return None\n\n    # Find the latest release\n    latest_release = max(releases, key=lambda r: datetime.fromisoformat(r.published_at.replace('Z', '+00:00')))\n\n    # Calculate days difference\n    deployed_date = datetime.fromisoformat(deployed_release.published_at.replace('Z', '+00:00'))\n    latest_date = datetime.fromisoformat(latest_release.published_at.replace('Z', '+00:00'))\n\n    days_diff = (latest_date - deployed_date).days\n    return days_diff if days_diff > 0 else 0\n\n\ndef check_correctness_drift(deployed_tag: str, releases: List[Release]) -> bool:\n    \"\"\"Check if deployment is behind a correctness release.\"\"\"\n    missed = get_missed_correctness_releases(deployed_tag, releases)\n    return len(missed) > 0\n\n\ndef get_missed_correctness_releases(deployed_tag: str, releases: List[Release]) -> List[str]:\n    \"\"\"Get list of correctness release tags that are newer than the deployed version.\"\"\"\n    deployed_version = parse_version(deployed_tag)\n    if deployed_version is None:\n        return []\n\n    # Collect all correctness releases with version > deployed_version\n    missed_releases = []\n    for release in releases:\n        release_version = parse_version(release.tag)\n        if release_version and release_version > deployed_version and release.is_correctness:\n            missed_releases.append(release.tag)\n\n    return missed_releases\n\n\ndef compare_drift(\n    deployments: List[Deployment],\n    releases: List[Release],\n    releases_threshold: int,\n    days_threshold: int\n) -> List[DriftReport]:\n    \"\"\"Compare deployments against releases and generate drift reports.\"\"\"\n    if not releases:\n        print(\"Warning: No releases found for comparison\", file=sys.stderr)\n        return []\n\n    # Find the latest release by version number\n    versioned_releases = [r for r in releases if parse_version(r.tag)]\n    if not versioned_releases:\n        print(\"Warning: No versioned releases found for comparison\", file=sys.stderr)\n        # Use the most recent release by date instead\n        latest_release = max(releases, key=lambda r: datetime.fromisoformat(r.published_at.replace('Z', '+00:00')))\n    else:\n        latest_release = max(versioned_releases, key=lambda r: parse_version(r.tag) or 0)\n    latest_tag = latest_release.tag\n\n    reports = []\n    for deployment in deployments:\n        deployed_version = parse_version(deployment.image_tag)\n\n        # Calculate releases behind\n        releases_behind = calculate_releases_behind(deployed_version, releases)\n\n        # Calculate days behind\n        days_behind = calculate_days_behind(deployment.image_tag, releases)\n\n        # Check for correctness drift and get missed releases\n        correctness_drift = check_correctness_drift(deployment.image_tag, releases)\n        missed_correctness = get_missed_correctness_releases(deployment.image_tag, releases)\n\n        # Determine if drift exceeds thresholds\n        is_drift = (\n            (releases_behind is not None and releases_behind >= releases_threshold) or\n            (days_behind is not None and days_behind >= days_threshold) or\n            correctness_drift\n        )\n\n        # Get deployed date\n        deployed_date = None\n        if deployed_version is not None:\n            for release in releases:\n                release_version = parse_version(release.tag)\n                if release_version == deployed_version:\n                    deployed_date = release.published_at\n                    break\n\n        # Get latest date\n        latest_date = latest_release.published_at\n\n        report = DriftReport(\n            cluster=deployment.cluster,\n            deployed_tag=deployment.image_tag,\n            latest_tag=latest_tag,\n            releases_behind=releases_behind,\n            days_behind=days_behind,\n            is_drift=is_drift,\n            is_correctness_drift=correctness_drift,\n            missed_correctness_releases=missed_correctness,\n            deployed_date=deployed_date,\n            latest_date=latest_date,\n            filepath=deployment.filepath\n        )\n\n        reports.append(report)\n\n    return reports\n\n\ndef main():\n    \"\"\"Main entry point.\"\"\"\n    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(\n        description='Compare ARMOR deployments against GitHub releases to detect version drift'\n    )\n    parser.add_argument(\n        '--deployments',\n        required=True,\n        help='Path to JSON file containing deployments output from find-armor-deployments.py'\n    )\n    parser.add_argument(\n        '--releases',\n        required=True,\n        help='Path to JSON file containing releases output from github-release-fetcher.py'\n    )\n    parser.add_argument(\n        '--releases-threshold',\n        type=int,\n        default=50,\n        help='Flag deployments behind by N or more releases (default: 50)'\n    )\n    parser.add_argument(\n        '--days-threshold',\n        type=int,\n        default=30,\n        help='Flag deployments behind by M or more days (default: 30)'\n    )\n    parser.add_argument(\n        '--json',\n        action='store_true',\n        help='Output machine-readable JSON instead of human-readable format'\n    )\n    parser.add_argument(\n        '--sort-by',\n        choices=['cluster', 'releases', 'days', 'correctness'],\n        default='cluster',\n        help='Sort output by field (default: cluster)'\n    )\n\n    args = parser.parse_args()\n\n    # Load deployments\n    try:\n        with open(args.deployments, 'r') as f:\n            deployments_data = json.load(f)\n        deployments = [Deployment(**d) for d in deployments_data]\n    except Exception as e:\n        print(f\"Error loading deployments: {e}\", file=sys.stderr)\n        sys.exit(1)\n\n    # Load releases\n    try:\n        with open(args.releases, 'r') as f:\n            releases_data = json.load(f)\n        releases = [Release(**r) for r in releases_data]\n    except Exception as e:\n        print(f\"Error loading releases: {e}\", file=sys.stderr)\n        sys.exit(1)\n\n    # Compare drift\n    reports = compare_drift(\n        deployments,\n        releases,\n        args.releases_threshold,\n        args.days_threshold\n    )\n\n    # Sort reports\n    if args.sort_by == 'cluster':\n        reports.sort(key=lambda r: r.cluster)\n    elif args.sort_by == 'releases':\n        reports.sort(key=lambda r: r.releases_behind or 0, reverse=True)\n    elif args.sort_by == 'days':\n        reports.sort(key=lambda r: r.days_behind or 0, reverse=True)\n    elif args.sort_by == 'correctness':\n        reports.sort(key=lambda r: r.is_correctness_drift, reverse=True)\n\n    # Output\n    if args.json:\n        output_json(reports, args.releases_threshold, args.days_threshold)\n    else:\n        output_human_readable(reports, args.releases_threshold, args.days_threshold)\n\n\ndef output_json(reports: List[DriftReport], releases_threshold: int, days_threshold: int):\n    \"\"\"Output machine-readable JSON.\"\"\"\n    output = {\n        \"thresholds\": {\n            \"releases\": releases_threshold,\n            \"days\": days_threshold\n        },\n        \"summary\": {\n            \"total_deployments\": len(reports),\n            \"with_drift\": sum(1 for r in reports if r.is_drift),\n            \"with_correctness_drift\": sum(1 for r in reports if r.is_correctness_drift)\n        },\n        \"deployments\": []\n    }\n\n  \"\"\"Output human-readable summary.\"\"\"\n    print(\"=\" * 80)\n    print(\"ARMOR Version Drift Comparison\")\n    print(\"=\" * 80)\n    print(f\"Thresholds: > {releases_threshold} releases, > {days_threshold} days\")\n    print()\n\n    # Print individual reports\n    for report in reports:\n        status_icon = \"🔴\" if report.is_correctness_drift else (\"🟡\" if report.is_drift else    is_correctness: bool\n    url: str\n\n\n@dataclass\nclass Deployment:\n    \"\"\"ARMOR deployment information.\"\"\"\n    cluster: str\n    image_tag: str\n    filepath: str\n\n\n@dataclass\nclass DriftReport:\n    \"\"\"Drift comparison report for a single deployment.\"\"\"\n    cluster: str\n    deployed_tag: str\n    latest_tag: str\n    releases_behind: Optional[int]\n    days_behind: Optional[int]\n    is_drift: bool\n    is_correctness_drift: bool\n    missed_correctness_releases: List[str]\n    deployed_date: Optional[str]\n    latest_date: Optional[str]\n    filepath: str\n\n\ndef parse_version(tag: str) -> Optional[int]:\n    \"\"\"Parse version tag to integer (e.g., 'v0.1.42' -> 42, 'fcbf6d3' -> None).\"\"\"\n    import re\n    match = re.match(r'v?0\\.1\\.(\\d+)', tag)\n    if match:\n        return int(match.group(1))\n    return None\n\n\ndef calculate_releases_behind(deployed_version: Optional[int], releases: List[Release]) -> Optional[int]:\n    \"\"\"Calculate how many releases a deployment is behind.\"\"\"\n    if deployed_version is None:\n        return None\n\n    # Count releases with version number greater than deployed\n    releases_behind = 0\n    for release in releases:\n        release_version = parse_version(release.tag)\n        if release_version and release_version > deployed_version:\n            releases_behind += 1\n\n    return releases_behind if releases_behind > 0 else 0\n\n\ndef calculate_days_behind(deployed_tag: str, releases: List[Release]) -> Optional[int]:\n    \"\"\"Calculate days behind based on release dates.\"\"\"\n    deployed_version = parse_version(deployed_tag)\n    if deployed_version is None:\n        return None\n\n    # Find the release that matches the deployed version\n    deployed_release = None\n    for release in releases:\n        release_version = parse_version(release.tag)\n        if release_version == deployed_version:\n            deployed_release = release\n            break\n\n    if not deployed_release:\n        return None\n\n    # Find the latest release\n    latest_release = max(releases, key=lambda r: datetime.fromisoformat(r.published_at.replace('Z', '+00:00')))\n\n    # Calculate days difference\n    deployed_date = datetime.fromisoformat(deployed_release.published_at.replace('Z', '+00:00'))\n    latest_date = datetime.fromisoformat(latest_release.published_at.replace('Z', '+00:00'))\n\n    days_diff = (latest_date - deployed_date).days\n    return days_diff if days_diff > 0 else 0\n\n\ndef check_correctness_drift(deployed_tag: str, releases: List[Release]) -> bool:\n    \"\"\"Check if deployment is behind a correctness release.\"\"\"\n    missed = get_missed_correctness_releases(deployed_tag, releases)\n    return len(missed) > 0\n\n\ndef get_missed_correctness_releases(deployed_tag: str, releases: List[Release]) -> List[str]:\n    \"\"\"Get list of correctness release tags that are newer than the deployed version.\"\"\"\n    deployed_version = parse_version(deployed_tag)\n    if deployed_version is None:\n        return []\n\n    # release_version and release_version > deployed_version and release.is_correctness:\n            missed_releases.append(release.tag)\n\n    return missed_releases\n\n\ndef compare_drift(\n    deployments: List[Deployment],\n    releases: List[Release],\n    releases_threshold: int,\n    days_threshold: int\n) -> List[DriftReport]:\n    \"\"\"Compare deployments against releases and generate drift reports.\"\"\"\n    if not releases:\n        print(\"Warning: No releases found for comparison\", file=sys.stderr)\n        return []\n\n    # Find the latest release by version number\n    versioned_releases = [r for r in releases if parse_version(r.tag)]\n    if not versioned_releases:\n        print(\"Warning: No versioned releases found for comparison\", file=sys.stderr)\n        # Use the most recent release by date instead\n        latest_release = max(releases, key=lambda r: datetime.fromisoformat(r.published_at.replace('Z', '+00:00')))\n    else:\n        latest_release = max(versioned_releases, key=lambda r: parse_version(r.tag) or 0)\n    latest_tag = latest_release.tag\n\n    reports = []\n    for deployment in deployments:\n        deployed_version = parse_version(deployment.image_tag)\n\n        # Calculate releases behind\n        releases_behind = calculate_releases_behind(deployed_version, releases)\n\n        # Calculate days behind\n        days_behind = calculate_days_behind(deployment.image_tag, releases)\n\n        # Check for correctness drift and get missed releases\n        correctness_drift = check_correctness_drift(deployment.image_tag, releases)\n        missed_correctness = get_missed_correctness_releases(deployment.image_tag, releases)\n\n        # Determine if drift exceeds thresholds\n        is_drift = (\n            (releases_behind is not None and releases_behind >= releases_threshold) or\n            (days_behind is not None and days_behind >= days_threshold) or\n            correctness_drift\n        )\n\n        # Get deployed date\n        deployed_date = None\n        if deployed_version is not None:\n            for release in releases:\n                release_version = parse_version(release.tag)\n                if release_version == deployed_version:\n                    deployed_date = release.published_at\n                    break\n\n        # Get latest date\n        latest_date = latest_release.published_at\n\n        report = DriftReport(\n            cluster=deployment.cluster,\n            deployed_tag=deployment.image_tag,\n            latest_tag=latest_tag,\n            releases_behind=releases_behind,\n            days_behind=days_behind,\n            is_drift=is_drift,\n            is_correctness_drift=correctness_drift,\n            missed_correctness_releases=missed_correctness,\n            deployed_date=deployed_date,\n            latest_date=latest_date,\n            filepath=deployment.filepath\n        )\n\n        reports.append(report)\n\n    return reports\n\n\ndef main():\n    \"\"\"Main entry point.\"\"\"\n    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(\n        description='Compare ARMOR deployments against GitHub releases to detect version drift'\n    )\n    parser.add_argument(\n        '--deployments',\n        required=True,\n        help='Path to JSON file containing deployments output from find-armor-deployments.py'\n    )\n    parser.add_argument(\n        '--releases',\n        required=True,\n        help='Path to JSON file containing releases output from github-release-fetcher.py'\n    )\n    parser.add_argument(\n        '--releases-threshold',\n        type=int,\n        default=50,\n        help='Flag deployments behind by N or more releases (default: 50)'\n    )\n    parser.add_argument(\n        '--days-threshold',\n        type=int,\n        default=30,\n        help='Flag deployments behind by M or more days (default: 30)'\n    )\n    parser.add_argument(\n        '--json',\n        action='store_true',\n        help='Output machine-readable JSON instead of human-readable format'\n    )\n    parser.add_argument(\n        '--sort-by',\n        choices=['cluster', 'releases', 'days', 'correctness'],\n        default='cluster',\n        help='Sort output by field (default: cluster)'\n    )\n\n    args = parser.parse_args()\n\n    # Load deployments\n    try:\n        with open(args.deployments, 'r') as f:\n            deployments_data = json.load(f)\n        deployments = [Deployment(**d) for d in deployments_data]\n    except Exception as e:\n        print(f\"Error loading deployments: {e}\", file=sys.stderr)\n        sys.exit(1)\n\n    # Load releases\n    try:\n        with open(args.releases, 'r') as f:\n            releases_data = json.load(f)\n        releases = [Release(**r) for r in releases_data]\n    except Exception as e:\n        print(f\"Error loading releases: {e}\", file=sys.stderr)\n        sys.exit(1)\n\n    # Compare drift\n    reports = compare_drift(\n        deployments,\n        releases,\n        args.releases_threshold,\n        args.days_threshold\n    )\n\n    # Sort reports\n    if args.sort_by == 'cluster':\n        reports.sort(key=lambda r: r.cluster)\n    elif args.sort_by == 'releases':\n        reports.sort(key=lambda r: r.releases_behind or 0, reverse=True)\n    elif args.sort_by == 'days':\n        reports.sort(key=lambda r: r.days_behind or 0, reverse=True)\n    elif args.sort_by == 'correctness':\n        reports.sort(key=lambda r: r.is_correctness_drift, reverse=True)\n\n    # Output\n    if args.json:\n        output_json(reports, args.releases_threshold, args.days_threshold)\n    else:\n        output_human_readable(reports, args.releases_threshold, args.days_threshold)\n\n\ndef output_json(reports: List[DriftReport], releases_threshold: int, days_threshold: int):\n    \"\"\"Output machine-readable JSON.\"\"\"\n    output = {\n        \"thresholds\": {\n            \"releases\": releases_threshold,\n            \"days\": days_threshold\n        },\n        \"summary\": {\n            \"total_deployments\": len(reports),\n            \"with_drift\": sum(1 for r in reports if r.is_drift),\n            \"with_correctness_drift\": sum(1 for r in reports if r.is_correctness_drift)\n        },\n        \"deployments\": []\n    }\n\n report.is_correctness_drift,\n            \"missed_correctness_releases\": report.missed_correctness_releases,\n            \"deployed_date\": report.deployed_date,\n            \"latest_date\": report.latest_date,\n            \"filepath\": report.filepath\n        }\n        output[\"deployments\"].append(deployment_dict)\n\n    print(json.dumps(output, indent=2))\n\n\ndef output_human_readable(reports: List[DriftReport], releases_threshold: int, days_threshold: int):\n    \"\"\"Output human-readable summary.\"\"\"\n    print(\"=\" * 80)\n    print(\"ARMOR Version Drift Comparison\")\n    print(\"=\" * 80)\n    print(f\"Thresholds: > {releases_threshold} releases, > {days_threshold} days\")\n    print()\n\n    # Print individual reports\n    for report in reports:\n {report.deployed_tag}\")\n        print(f\"   Latest:   {report.latest_tag}\")\n\n        if report.releases_behind is not None:\n            print(f\"   Releases behind: github-release-fetcher.py and find-armor-deployments.py.\n\nAcceptance Criteria:\n- Configurable thresholds (N releases, M days)\n- Returns structured report per cluster: {cluster, deployed_tag, latest_tag, releases_behind, days_behind, is_drift, is_correctness_drift}\n- Correctness drift gets highest priority flag\n- Machine-readable JSON output\n\"\"\"\n\nimport argparse\nimport json\nimport sys\nfrom datetime import datetime\nfrom typing import Dict, List, Optional\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\n\n\n@dataclass\nclass Release:\n    \"\"\"GitHub release information.\"\"\"\n    tag: str\n    published_at: str\n    is_correctness: bool\n    url: str\n\n\n@dataclass\nclass Deployment:\n    \"\"\"ARMOR deployment information.\"\"\"\n    cluster: str\n    image_tag: str\n    filepath: str\n\n\n@dataclass\nclass DriftReport:\n    \"\"\"Drift comparison report for a single deployment.\"\"\"\n    cluster: str\n    deployed_tag: str\n    latest_tag: str\n    releases_behind: Optional[int]\n    days_behind: Optional[int]\n    is_drift: bool\n    is_correctness_drift: bool\n    missed_correctness_releases: List[str]\n    deployed_date: Optional[str]\n    latest_date: Optional[str]\n    filepath: str\n\n\ndef parse_version(tag: str) -> Optional[int]:\n    \"\"\"Parse version tag to integer (e.g., 'v0.1.42' -> 42, 'fcbf6d3' -> None).\"\"\"\n    import re\n    match = re.match(r'v?0\\.1\\.(\\d+)', tag)\n    if match:\n        return int(match.group(1))\n    return None\n\n\ndef calculate_releases_behind(deployed_version: Optional[int], releases: List[Release]) -> Optional[int]:\n    \"\"\"Calculate how many releases a deployment is behind.\"\"\"\n    if deployed_version is None:\n        return None\n\n    # Count releases with version number greater than deployed\n    releases_behind = 0\n    for release in releases:\n        release_version = parse_version(release.tag)\n        if release_version and release_version > deployed_version:\n            releases_behind += 1\n\n    return releases_behind if releases_behind > 0 else 0\n\n\ndef calculate_days_behind(deployed_tag: str, releases: List[Release]) -> Optional[int]:\n    \"\"\"Calculate days behind based on release dates.\"\"\"\n    deployed_version = parse_version(deployed_tag)\n    if deployed_version is None:\n        return None\n\n    # Find the release that matches the deployed version\n    deployed_release = None\n    for release in releases:\n        release_version = parse_version(release.tag)\n        if release_version == deployed_version:\n            deployed_release = release\n            break\n\n    if not deployed_release:\n        return None\n\n    # Find the latest release\n    latest_release = max(releases, key=lambda r: datetime.fromisoformat(r.published_at.replace('Z', '+00:00')))\n\n    # Calculate days difference\n    deployed_date = datetime.fromisoformat(deployed_release.published_at.replace('Z', '+00:00'))\n    latest_date = datetime.fromisoformat(latest_release.published_at.replace('Z', '+00:00'))\n\n    days_diff = (latest_date - deployed_date).days\n    return days_diff if days_diff > 0 else 0\n\n\ndef check_correctness_drift(deployed_tag: str, releases: List[Release]) -> bool:\n    \"\"\"Check if deployment is behind a correctness release.\"\"\"\n    missed = get_missed_correctness_releases(deployed_tag, releases)\n    return len(missed) > 0\n\n\ndef get_missed_correctness_releases(deployed_tag: str, releases: List[Release]) -> List[str]:\n    \"\"\"Get list of correctness release tags that are newer than the deployed version.\"\"\"\n    deployed_version = parse_version(deployed_tag)\n    if deployed_version is None:\n        return []\n\n    # Collect all correctness releases with version > deployed_version\n    missed_releases = []\n    for release in releases:\n        release_version = parse_version(release.tag)\n        if release_version and release_version > deployed_version and release.is_correctness:\n            missed_releases.append(release.tag)\n\n    return missed_releases\n\n\ndef compare_drift(\n    deployments: List[Deployment],\n    releases: List[Release],\n    releases_threshold: int,\n    days_threshold: int\n) -> List[DriftReport]:\n    \"\"\"Compare deployments against releases and generate drift reports.\"\"\"\n    if not releases:\n        print(\"Warning: No releases found for comparison\", file=sys.stderr)\n        return []\n\n    # Find the latest release by version number\n    versioned_releases = [r for r in releases if parse_version(r.tag)]\n    if not versioned_releases:\n        print(\"Warning: No versioned releases found for comparison\", file=sys.stderr)\n        # Use the most recent release by date instead\n        latest_release = max(releases, key=lambda r: datetime.fromisoformat(r.published_at.replace('Z', '+00:00')))\n    else:\n        latest_release = max(versioned_releases, key=lambda r: parse_version(r.tag) or 0)\n    latest_tag = latest_release.tag\n\n    reports = []\n    for deployment in deployments:\n        deployed_version = parse_version(deployment.image_tag)\n\n        # Calculate releases behind\n        releases_behind = calculate_releases_behind(deployed_version, releases)\n\n        # Calculate days behind\n        days_behind = calculate_days_behind(deployment.image_tag, releases)\n\n        # Check for correctness drift and get missed releases\n        correctness_drift = check_correctness_drift(deployment.image_tag, releases)\n        missed_correctness = get_missed_correctness_releases(deployment.image_tag, releases)\n\n        # Determine if drift exceeds thresholds\n        is_drift = (\n            (releases_behind is not None and releases_behind >= releases_threshold) or\n            (days_behind is not None and days_behind >= days_threshold) or\n            correctness_drift\n        )\n\n        # Get deployed date\n        deployed_date = None\n        if deployed_version is not None:\n            for release in releases:\n                release_version = parse_version(release.tag)\n                if release_version == deployed_version:\n                    deployed_date = release.published_at\n                    break\n\n        # Get latest date\n        latest_date = latest_release.published_at\n\n        report = DriftReport(\n            cluster=deployment.cluster,\n            deployed_tag=deployment.image_tag,\n            latest_tag=latest_tag,\n            releases_behind=releases_behind,\n            days_behind=days_behind,\n            is_drift=is_drift,\n            is_correctness_drift=correctness_drift,\n            missed_correctness_releases=missed_correctness,\n            deployed_date=deployed_date,\n            latest_date=latest_date,\n            filepath=deployment.filepath\n        )\n\n        reports.append(report)\n\n    return reports\n\n\ndef main():\n    \"\"\"Main entry point.\"\"\"\n    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(\n        description='Compare ARMOR deployments against GitHub releases to detect version drift'\n    )\n    parser.add_argument(\n        '--deployments',\n        required=True,\n        help='Path to JSON file containing deployments output from find-armor-deployments.py'\n    )\n    parser.add_argument(\n        '--releases',\n        required=True,\n        help='Path to JSON file containing releases output from github-release-fetcher.py'\n    )\n    parser.add_argument(\n        '--releases-threshold',\n        type=int,\n        default=50,\n        help='Flag deployments behind by N or more releases (default: 50)'\n    )\n    parser.add_argument(\n        '--days-threshold',\n        type=int,\n        default=30,\n        help='Flag deployments behind by M or more days (default: 30)'\n    )\n    parser.add_argument(\n        '--json',\n        action='store_true',\n        help='Output machine-readable JSON instead of human-readable format'\n    )\n    parser.add_argument(\n        '--sort-by',\n        choices=['cluster', 'releases', 'days', 'correctness'],\n        default='cluster',\n        help='Sort output by field (default: cluster)'\n    )\n\n    args = parser.parse_args()\n\n    # Load deployments\n    try:\n        with open(args.deployments, 'r') as f:\n            deployments_data = json.load(f)\n        deployments = [Deployment(**d) for d in deployments_data]\n    except Exception as e:\n        print(f\"Error loading deployments: {e}\", file=sys.stderr)\n        sys.exit(1)\n\n    # Load releases\n    try:\n        with open(args.releases, 'r') as f:\n            releases_data = json.load(f)\n        releases = [Release(**r) for r in releases_data]\n    except Exception as e:\n        print(f\"Error loading releases: {e}\", file=sys.stderr)\n        sys.exit(1)\n\n    # Compare drift\n    reports = compare_drift(\n        deployments,\n        releases,\n        args.releases_threshold,\n        args.days_threshold\n    )\n\n    # Sort reports\n    if args.sort_by == 'cluster':\n        reports.sort(key=lambda r: r.cluster)\n    elif args.sort_by == 'releases':\n        reports.sort(key=lambda r: r.releases_behind or 0, reverse=True)\n    elif args.sort_by == 'days':\n        reports.sort(key=lambda r: r.days_behind or 0, reverse=True)\n    elif args.sort_by == 'correctness':\n        reports.sort(key=lambda r: r.is_correctness_drift, reverse=True)\n\n    # Output\n    if args.json:\n        output_json(reports, args.releases_threshold, args.days_threshold)\n    else:\n        output_human_readable(reports, args.releases_threshold, args.days_threshold)\n\n\ndef output_json(reports: List[DriftReport], releases_threshold: int, days_threshold: int):\n    \"\"\"Output machine-readable JSON.\"\"\"\n    output = {\n        \"thresholds\": {\n            \"releases\": releases_threshold,\n            \"days\": days_threshold\n        },\n        \"summary\": {\n            \"total_deployments\": len(reports),\n            \"with_drift\": sum(1 for r in reports if r.is_drift),\n            \"with_correctness_drift\": sum(1 for r in reports if r.is_correctness_drift)\n        },\n        \"deployments\": []\n    }\n\n        \"releases_behind\": report.releases_behind,\n            \"days_behind\": report.days_behind,\n            \"is_drift\": report.is_drift,\n            \"is_correctness_drift\": report.is_correctness_drift,\n            \"missed_correctness_releases\": report.missed_correctness_releases,\n            \"deployed_date\": report.deployed_date,\n            \"latest_date\": report.latest_date,\n            \"filepath\": report.filepath\n        }\n        output[\"deployments\"].append(deployment_dict)\n\n    print(json.dumps(output, indent=2))\n\n\ndef output_human_readable(reports: List[DriftReport], releases_threshold: int, days_threshold: int):\n    \"\"\"Output human-readable summary.\"\"\"\n    print(\"=\" * 80)\n    print(\"ARMOR Version Drift Comparison\")\n    print(\"=\" * 80)\n    print(f\"Thresholds: > {releases_threshold} releases, > {days_threshold} days\")\n    print()\n\n    # Print individual reports\n    for report in reports:\n        status_icon = \"🔴\" if report.is_correctness_drift else (\"🟡\" if report.is_drift else \"✅\")\n\n        print(f\"{status_icon} {report.cluster}\")\n        print(f\"   Deployed: {report.deployed_tag}\")\n        print(f\"   Latest:   {report.latest_tag}\")\n\n        if report.releases_behind is not None:\n            print(f\"   Releases behind: {report.releases_behind}\")\n\n        if report.days_behind is not None:\n            print(f\"   Days behind: {report.days_behind}\")\n\n        if report.is_correctness_drift:\n            if
